examples.title: Basic form field
examples.description: A form field wrapping an input with label association.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import { FormField } from '@lostgradient/cinder/form-field';
  import { Input } from '@lostgradient/cinder/input';

  let name = $state('');
</script>

<FormField id="full-name" label="Full name">
  <Input id="full-name" bind:value={name} placeholder="Jane Smith" />
</FormField>

examples.title: Composed input — context inheritance
examples.description: Input inside FormField inherits aria-describedby and aria-invalid from context.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts" module>
  export const title = 'Composed input — context inheritance';
  export const description =
    'Input inside FormField inherits aria-describedby and aria-invalid from context. ' +
    'Partial override: Input has its own description; FormField provides the error. ' +
    'Final aria-describedby joins both ids.';
</script>

<script lang="ts">
  import { FormField } from '@lostgradient/cinder/form-field';
  import { Input } from '@lostgradient/cinder/input';
  let username = $state('');
</script>

<!--
  FormField owns the error; Input has its own description.
  The Input's aria-describedby will be:
    "username-description username-error"
  where "username-description" comes from the Input's own description prop
  and "username-error" comes from the FormField's context.errorId.
-->
<FormField id="username" label="Username" error="Username is already taken." required>
  <Input
    id="username"
    bind:value={username}
    description="Letters, numbers, and underscores only."
    placeholder="cool_username"
  />
</FormField>

examples.title: Form field with error
examples.description: Error state wires aria-invalid and aria-describedby on the wrapped control.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import { FormField } from '@lostgradient/cinder/form-field';
  import { Input } from '@lostgradient/cinder/input';
  let email = $state('not-an-email');
</script>

<FormField
  id="email"
  label="Email address"
  description="We'll never share your email."
  error="Enter a valid email address."
  required
>
  <Input id="email" bind:value={email} type="email" placeholder="you@example.com" />
</FormField>
